nasb.text: He said, “What are these cities which you have given me, my brother?” So they were called the land of Cabul to this day.

esv.text: Therefore he said, “What kind of cities are these that you have given me, my brother?” So they are called the land of Cabul to this day.

cnv.text: 他說：“我的兄弟啊，這些就是你送給我的城嗎？”於是他給這些城起名叫迦步勒，直到今日。

ccb.text: “兄弟啊，你送给我的是什么城邑呀？”因此，他称这个地区为迦步勒，沿用至今。
